title: Sales and Marketing Analyst Commerce (m/w/d)
required_skills: Mind. 3 Jahre Berufserfahrung Controlling/BI E-Commerce oder Multichannel
matched_skills: BI-Tools: Power BI (Microsoft Certified PL-300), Google Looker Studio, SAP Analytics
missing_skills: Google Analytics (not explicitly listed in CV)
Dedicated Controlling/BI role in e-commerce (experience is more marketing-side)
Very good German skills (CV shows B1+ only)
core_responsibilities: Analyse von KPI rund um E-Commerce, Stores, Customer Journey, Traffic, Marketingkanäle und Conversion
Erstellung von Umsatz- und Budgetplanungen für Online- und Offline-Kanäle sowie laufende Forecasts und Budgetkontrolle
Vertriebs- und Marketing-Controlling sowie Erstellung von Dashboards und Reportings
Anwendung statistischer Methoden zur Trendanalyse, Prognose und Prozessoptimierung
Customer Journey Analysen über alle Marketing-Touchpoints für Budgetsteuerung und Prozessoptimierung
recommended_emphasis: Prominently feature Power BI certification (PL-300) and BI dashboard experience
Highlight budget controlling experience from HSBC ($8M programme) and reframe as forecasting/budget control evidence
Strengthen e-commerce relevance through Moli Media and Hapag-Lloyd customer data analysis
Thread KPI reporting and data-driven analysis as a consistent narrative across all roles
Present German language level honestly but positively (B1+ / actively improving)
Mention affinity for cycling or sport in general if applicable
Demonstrate independence and structured work approach with concrete examples
